description: convert 3 static-only classes to module-level functions

asi.hypothesis: Convert PermissionUtils, AgentFieldParser, AgentPromptTemplates from class with static members to module-level functions and constants
asi.what_worked: All three classes used only static members with no instance state, making conversion trivial

description: enable useTemplate lint rule, auto-fix 15 files

asi.hypothesis: Enable useTemplate style rule and apply unsafe auto-fixes to replace string concatenation with template literals, improving consistency and readability
